name: stream
title: Streamgraph
description: Stacked streamgraph widget — N seeded series (4 by default) accumulate into translucent flowing bands across 24 intervals. A declarative mount (data-widget="stream") is filled by the OOW.stream renderer with a single SVG. The total stacked height is measured once to derive one stable y-scale shared by every band, so layers nest cleanly; each band is closed between its pre-stack floor and post-stack ceiling with a smooth cubic-bezier top edge. Output is deterministic from opts.seed, so the graph renders identically every load. Per-series category colours are emitted as var() token fills (no hardcoded hex). Hovering peels focus onto a single band; a focusable mount gains a keyboard ring and a stale/paused state veils the viz. Depends on the shared series / smoothPath utils.
